SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery.models

Class Comment

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.models.Comment
public class Comment extends Object
Role: Data Model / Entity Purpose: Represents a user-generated comment on an event page. It facilitates real-time communication and moderation by storing message content, authorship timestamps, and associated user identifiers. Design Pattern: Data Transfer Object (DTO). This class facilitates the mapping of Firestore documents into local Java objects. Encapsulates the data for a single comment, including the sender's identity, the text content, and metadata such as creation time and edit status.

  • Constructor Details

    • Comment

      public Comment()
      Default constructor required for Firebase Firestore deserialization. Initializes the timestamp to the current system time and sets edited status to false.

    • Comment

      public Comment(String eventId, String userId, String userName, String text)
      Constructs a new Comment with specified authorship and content.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID of the event where the comment is posted.
      userId - The unique ID of the user posting the comment.
      userName - The display name of the user.
      text - The text content of the comment.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      The unique Firestore document ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Parameters:
      id - The unique Firestore document ID to set.

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns:
      The ID of the event this comment belongs to.

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Parameters:
      eventId - The event ID to associate with this comment.

    • getUserId

      public String getUserId()
      Returns:
      The ID of the user who authored the comment.

    • setUserId

      public void setUserId(String userId)
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the author.

    • getUserName

      public String getUserName()
      Returns:
      The display name of the author.

    • setUserName

      public void setUserName(String userName)
      Parameters:
      userName - The display name to set for the author.

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns:
      The text content of the comment.

    • setText

      public void setText(String text)
      Parameters:
      text - The text content to set.

    • getCreatedAt

      public long getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      The epoch timestamp when the comment was created.

    • setCreatedAt

      public void setCreatedAt(long createdAt)
      Parameters:
      createdAt - The creation timestamp to set.

    • isEdited

      public boolean isEdited()
      Returns:
      True if the comment has been modified after creation.

    • setEdited

      public void setEdited(boolean edited)
      Parameters:
      edited - The modified status to set.

    • getInitials

      public String getInitials()
      Extracts and returns the initials of the user's name for display in avatars. If the name contains multiple parts, it returns the first letter of the first and second parts. Otherwise, it returns the first letter of the name.
      Returns:
      A capitalized string of initials (e.g., "JD" for "John Doe"), or "?" if empty.
